title: Add links to installation instructions to intro tutorial

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

@estroz You need to sign your PR.

Also could you reformat you first message to be shorter, so it does not wrap.

$ git commit -a --amend -s
Fix the heading
$ git force --push

:pushpin: Commit ef56051 has been approved by `rhatdan`
